responseMessageContents.text:
## Goal
- Fix IVX app startup reliability (black screen, infinite loading, crash) and fix automatic owner sign-in on cold launch so the login screen appears every time, then build and ship APKs proving both fixes

## Constraints & Preferences
- ONLY the existing Expo React Native app is approved — no separate Kotlin app, no second Expo project, no replacement shell
- Approved Android package: `com.ivxholdings.app` (NOT `com.rork.ivxholdings` — that Kotlin app is frozen)
- Use `bun x` / `bunx` not `npx` (npx not allowed in sandbox)
- Never ask user for credentials — find them in project or work around blocker
- No secret values in logs, screenshots, reports — redact all tokens/keys
- Owner email: `iperez4242@gmail.com`
- API base: `https://api.ivxholding.com`
- EXPO_TOKEN and EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID are NOT set in sandbox — EAS cloud build blocked, must build locally
- Diagnostic banner must be hidden by default in ALL runtimes, available only through Owner Control → Diagnostics
- Owner AI send button must be disabled until `SIGNED_IN_OWNER` auth state
- Do NOT create new providers or architecture — modify the EXISTING codebase only
- **User demanded**: "remove nothing from this project from now rork is a paying developer can't told what direction I want to go" — never remove anything from the project, never tell user what direction to go
- **User demanded (build 20+)**: STOP all other development. Root navigator must render without waiting for network-dependent work. Never return null from root layout after splash hidden. Never leave root layout without a rendered screen.
- **User demanded (build 21)**: Full 13-phase audit — reproduce failure, audit every startup root, deterministic startup state machine, fix splash control, fix authentication, verify live services, provider isolation, Expo Go repair, APK repair, real device verification (10 cold launches), startup trace reaching APP_INTERACTIVE, remove duplicate/temporary systems, full execution report with 37 evidence items
- Startup trace checkpoints required: APP_NATIVE_STARTED, JS_BUNDLE_STARTED, ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ROOT_LAYOUT_RENDERED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED, PROVIDERS_MOUNTED, SPLASH_HIDE_STARTED, SPLASH_HIDE_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_FAILED, ROUTER_READY, INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED, INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED, APP_INTERACTIVE — all with elapsed ms
- APK download link MUST be a direct `.apk` file (application/octet-stream), NOT an HTML landing page
- Production APK must NOT depend on Metro, localhost, 127.0.0.1, 10.0.2.2, ngrok, or tunnel URLs

## Progress
### Done
- Build 16 auth context fixes (still present):
  - `initAuth()` calls `supabase.auth.signOut({ scope: 'local' })` on cold launch, sets `manualOwnerLoginRef.current = false`
  - `onAuthStateChange` gated by `manualOwnerLoginRef` — ignores all session events unless manual login occurred
  - `manualOwnerLoginRef` set unconditionally in `login()`, `loginOwnerPasswordless()`, `verify2FA()`
- Build 17 router auth guard added to `app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`
- Build 19 AsyncStorage fixes (still present):
  - `expo/lib/analytics.ts` line 1024: `removeMany` → `Promise.all + removeItem`
  - `expo/lib/api-resilience.ts` line 169: same fix
  - `expo/lib/email-context.tsx` line 225: same fix
  - `@react-native-async-storage/async-storage` downgraded to 2.2.0 for Expo SDK 54
- **Build 20 startup reliability fixes applied** (superseded by build 21 but code still present):
  - `expo/app/_layout.tsx`: REMOVED unconditional 5s startup timeout screen. Root layout always renders Stack. Deferred `SplashScreen.hideAsync()` to next frame via `setTimeout(..., 0)`. Added `ProviderMountProbe`.
  - `expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`: `initAuth()` NON-BLOCKING — sets `isLoading=false` in microtask BEFORE background signOut.
  - `expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`: Safety timeout reduced to 2s. Recoverable error UI with "Open Owner Login" button.
- **Build 21 startup audit final fixes applied**:
  - **NEW `expo/app/index.tsx`** — ROOT CAUSE #1 FIX: no initial route existed for `/`, causing black screen or +not-found. New file redirects to `/login` when not authenticated, to `/(tabs)/(home)/home` when authenticated or in open-access mode. Shows dark loading screen with ActivityIndicator during brief auth bootstrap.
  - **`expo/metro.config.js` REWRITTEN** — ROOT CAUSE #2 FIX: previous build claimed try/catch but actual file was bare `require("@rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro")`. Now properly wrapped in try/catch with fallback to default config. Verified in build log: `[IVX] Metro config: @rork-ai/toolkit-sdk/metro not available — using default Expo config`.
  - **`expo/lib/auth-context.tsx` line ~1668** — ROOT CAUSE #3 FIX: removed hardcoded password `X146corp@1x146corp$$1` from `loginOwnerPasswordless` fallback. Now returns `{ success: false, message: 'Owner passwordless login is not available...', failureReason: 'service_unavailable' }` instead of auto-submitting credentials.
  - **`expo/components/SupabaseAuthDiagnostic.tsx` line 60-63** — removed same hardcoded password. Now calls `supabase.auth.getSession()` instead of `signInWithPassword()` with hardcoded credentials.
  - **`expo/lib/startup-trace.ts` REWRITTEN** — added all 21 required checkpoints including APP_NATIVE_STARTED, JS_BUNDLE_STARTED, ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_FAILED, INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED, APP_INTERACTIVE. Added `getStartupTraceInfo()`, `isStartupComplete()`, `getStartupTraceId()` exports.
  - **`expo/app/_layout.tsx`** — added ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED, ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED, PROVIDERS_STARTED, PROVIDERS_COMPLETED checkpoints. Added APP_INTERACTIVE after SPLASH_HIDE_COMPLETED (also in catch path — app interactive even if splash hide fails).
  - **`expo/app/(tabs)/_layout.tsx`** — added INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED and APP_INTERACTIVE checkpoints.
  - **`expo/app/login.tsx`** — added APP_INTERACTIVE checkpoint after INITIAL_ROUTE_RENDERED.
  - **`expo/lib/auth-context.tsx`** — added AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_COMPLETED, AUTH_INITIALIZATION_FAILED alongside existing AUTH_INIT_* names.
  - **`expo/app.config.ts`** — bumped to versionCode 21, buildMarker `IVX_BUNDLE_2026_07_15_BUILD_21_STARTUP_AUDIT_FINAL`, sourceCommitSha `c493811527d27ac72046ec83f46044c89b5b5889`, watchdogPatchVersion `ai-mutation-watchdog-fix-v9-startup-audit`.
- **Build 21 Gradle `assembleRelease` COMPLETED** — BUILD SUCCESSFUL in 1m 3s, 424 tasks, 23 executed, 401 up-to-date. Metro bundle: 3855 modules, 28031ms.
- **Build 21 APK built and uploaded**:
  - File: `/home/user/rork-app/ivx-holdings-v1.4.3-build21.apk`
  - Size: 82,895,742 bytes (~79MB)
  - SHA-256: `352f7a8ab2ddb53262979da4c1e80647098e7c65270fdbe32a4fd1b7757ab618`
  - Download: `https://litter.catbox.moe/tf2hx3.apk` (72h expiry)
  - Verified: HTTP 200, `application/octet-stream`, `content-length: 82895742`, `accept-ranges: bytes`
- **Bundle verification (build 21) — ALL CLEAN**:
  - 0 `X146corp` (hardcoded password removed) ✓
  - 0 `removeMany` ✓
  - 0 `taking longer than expected` ✓
  - 0 `localhost`, 0 `127.0.0.1`, 0 `10.0.2.2`, 0 `ngrok`, 0 `exp://`, 0 `loca.lt`, 0 `192.168`, 0 `169.254` ✓
  - 1 `IVX-STARTUP` ✓, 1 `APP_INTERACTIVE` ✓, 1 `INITIAL_ROUTE_SELECTED` ✓, 1 `ROOT_COMPONENT_MOUNTED` ✓, 1 `ERROR_BOUNDARY_MOUNTED` ✓, 1 `PROVIDERS_STARTED` ✓, 1 `AUTH_INITIALIZATION_STARTED` ✓
  - 1 `kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co` ✓, 1 `PRODUCTION_SUPABASE_URL` ✓, 5 `api.ivxholding.com` ✓
  - 19 `Redirect` occurrences (app/index.tsx included) ✓
- **Live service verification**:
  - `https://api.ivxholding.com/health` → HTTP 200, `{"ok":true,"status":"healthy","service":"ivx-owner-ai-backend","commit":"0b37191f7b9f61b304351784d3ce78b4bf35df2c"}`
  - `https://ivx-holdings-platform.onrender.com/health` → HTTP 200, same response
  - `https://kvclcdjmjghndxsngfzb.supabase.co/auth/v1/health` → HTTP 401 (expected without apikey header — endpoint exists and responds)
- `DEPLOYMENT_PROOF.json` — partially updated for build 21 (some edits failed due to duplicate strings in file, still has build 20 details in some fields)
- Watchman neutralized — replaced `/usr/local/bin/watchman` with no-op script
- `rork.json` updated — Expo app registered with `framework: "react-native"`, `path: "expo"`
- node_modules reinstalled in `expo/` via `bun install` (1335 packages)

### In Progress
- User needs to test build 21 APK on real Android device — verify no black screen, Owner Login renders, startup trace reaches APP_INTERACTIVE, 10 cold launches, manual login, logout, back navigation, offline launch

### Blocked
- EXPO_TOKEN not set — EAS cloud build unavailable
- EXPO_PUBLIC_EAS_PROJECT_ID not set — defaults to placeholder
- GitHub token expired (HTTP 401) — cannot push to GitHub repo, Render backend stuck at `0b37191f`
- Real-device testing cannot be done in sandbox — user must test installed APK on
